titleStmt.title: SII 38.353: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 353. (A.R. No. 353 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadēvarāya Year: Śaka 1441, Bahudānya, Karkaṭka śu. di. 13, Asvini Siddhayōga = January 7, 1519 A.D.

summary.p: It records the conferment of the right of cultivation (uḻavu-kāṇiāṭchi) of a village owned by the temple (tirunāmakkāṇi) on a certain Sadāśiva Nāyakkar, son of Mallappar Nāyakkar, a Kaṉṉaḍiya nāyakka and a resident of Marudarasar-paḍaivīḍu, by the pontiff of Bhīkshā-maṭha of Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār temple, tāṉattār (trustees), māyēsvarar (temple servants) of the Tirumalar-uḍaiyanayiṉār temple at Dēvakkāpuram at Murgamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟak-kkōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam. It is recorded that the tank of the said village was breached and the lands fell fallow. Sadāśiva Nāyakkar was given the right to repair the tank, reclaim all the lands and settle people. Further the record mentions that he was given not only the right of cultivation but also to cultivate any plants of his choice, but was required to remit taxes such as vāsalpēṟ-kaḍamai, taṟikkaḍamai, sekkōṭṭu, talaiyārikkam, nallerudu, and other taxes as kandāyam at the temple treasury, commencing from the month of Āḍi in the cyclic year Vegutāṉiya. Further he was also given a house at Dēvakkāpuram as uḻavu-kāṇiaṭchi. Īśanaśivāchāriyār, the pontiff, Karaiēraviṭṭar Chandranambi, the tāṉattār and several other figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī man mahāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva kiṣṇateva makāirāyar pradvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāpdam
1000 4 100 4 10 1 mel cellā niṉṟa vekutāṉiyavaruṣam kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūṟuva pakṣattu trayodaciyum bhomāśvinayum peṟṟa cittayokatin nāḷ
ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟa koṭṭattu mel kuṉṟa nāṭu murukamaṅkalapaṟṟu Irācakempīraṉmalaikku Aṭuttappaṟṟu
ceyyāṟṟukku teṉpirivuāṉa tevastāṉam tevakkāpuram nayiṉār tirumalaruṭaiya nayiṉār śrīpaṇṭārattukku kaṭavāṉ pikṣāmaṭam yīcāṉacivācāriya»The letter » is engraved below.
tāṉattārum māyecurarum kaikoḷamutaliyaḷum Āka Ivvaṉaivarum marutaracarpaṭaiviṭṭil Irukkum kaṉṉaṭiyanāyakkapāṭiyaḷil mallappa nāyaṉār makaṉār
catāciva nāyakkarukku Uḻavukāṇiāḻci paṇṇi kuṭuttapaṭi tevastāṉam nayiṉār tirumalar Uṭaiya nayiṉār tirunāmakāṇi Āṉa Irupakāṇi kiṟāmam Oṉṟum Eri Uṭaiñcu poy A
ṉāti taram pāyyirukkaiyilRead pāḻāyirukkaiyilInta Eriyum veṭampum nilamum tirutti yinta Ūrum kuṭi Eṟṟikkoṇṭu nañcai puñcai nāṟpākkellaiyum taṟamRead tāmveṇṭum payirceytukoḷḷa
kaṭavaraākavum payirceyyu(m)miṭattu poṉvaṟkam nelvaṟkam māvaṭai maravaṭai vāḻaikarumpu mañcaḷḷiñci kamuku tennamaram nañcai puñcai kaṭamai Uḷpaṭa vācalpeṟkaṭamai taṟikkaṭamai
cekkoṭṭu Eruttucammātam mātārikkam talaiyārikkam Ācuvakkaṭamai paṭṭaṭai nūlāyam Iṭaittuṟai veṭṭivari kopuravācalil
paḻavari putuvari nallerutu naṟpacu nallerummai naṟkiṭā koṇikai virimuṭṭu Eṭakkaṭṭāyam komakaṭṭāyam viruttuppāṭum
Uṭukaṟai mukampārvai maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakalavakaiyum Uṭpaṭa vekutāṉiya varuṣam Āṭimātam mutal caṉtirātitavaraikku varuṣam Oṉṟukku
tirumalaruṭaiyanayinaār śrīpaṇṭārattukku celuttuvatākavum Ima yira yitaṟketirā nam varuṣam Oṉṟukku 1 2 10 2 10 7 yitaṟ ketirām
varuṣam Oṉṟukku 3 10le madhi yitaṟketirām varuṣam Oṉṟukku 2 10ḷa 2 1000 Āka varuṣam 4(1/2) vum cittirapāṉuvaruṣam mutalāka
varuṣam 1 kku ø 4 10 2 10 4yira Āka Eṉṟeṉṟaikkum varuṣamvaruṣam toṟum mutal kantāya(m)māka cantirātittavaraiyum koyil paṇṭārattile celutta
kaṭavārākavum Inta Uḻavu kāṇiāḻcci kuṭiiruppu kāṇi Āḻcci Āka paṇṇi kuṭuttom tevastāṉam tevakkāpurattil Ettappa nāyakkar Araimaṉai
kku teṉmeṟku maṉai Oṉṟum kāṇiāṭ(c)ciāka paṇṇi kuṭuttom Inta kāṇi Āḻcci Ivarkaḷ cantiraṉyātittavaramtitam caṉtirātittavaraiyum naṭakka
kaṭavatākavum yicāṉacivaācāryar Eḻuttu tāṉattār karai Ēṟaviṭṭār cantiranampi Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu tirumalaicivaṉ kaṇkāṇi civaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār
Eḻuttu kaikoḷamutaliyaḷ kaḷappāḷar kāliṅkarāyar kollāviṭṭār tampirāṉtoḻar veṭanayiṉār cantiranayiṉār Uḷḷiṭṭa kaikoḷa mutaliyaḷ
Eḻuttu Eḻutināmaikku koyilkaṇakku yicura piramarāyar Eṭṭiyappar putraṉ Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.353 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
